nasb.text: men who have gone astray from the truth saying that the resurrection has already taken place, and they upset the faith of some.

esv.text: who have swerved from the truth, saying that the resurrection has already happened. They are upsetting the faith of some.

cnv.text: 他們偏離了真道，說復活的事已經過去了，於是毀壞了一些人的信心。

ccb.text: 他们离经背道，说复活的事已成过去，动摇了许多人的信心。

csbs.text: 他们偏离了那有关真理的事，称复活为已经过去的事，结果推翻了一些人的信仰。
